content:
The terms "per-paragraph fiduciary intensity" and "duty-of-loyalty exposure per word" are not standard legal or financial metrics, so I need some clarification to assist you accurately.

Could you please provide the text of your board's latest resolution or specify what you mean by "fiduciary intensity" and "duty-of-loyalty exposure"? For example, are you referring to the number of fiduciary duties referenced, the level of risk implied, or some other measure? Once I have that, I can help analyze the document accordingly.
